headline: How The Casella Waste Systems (CWST) Narrative Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: The latest update holds Casella Waste Systems' fair value at US$113.50, keeping the refreshed price target in line with prior estimates. Street research around this level shows a mix of optimism and caution, with some firms trimming targets while others still see room for the stock in the low to mid US$100s. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and tones shape the evolving analyst story around Casella and what to watch next. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the...
